description: Search Redfin homes for sale via internal Stingray endpoints, sync to local SQLite, and run workflows the website doesn't expose — saved-search diff, $/sqft net-HOA ranking, sold comps, multi-region trends.

tools.name: homes_list
tools.description: Run a Stingray gis search and return parsed listing rows from the JSON map payload. Strip the {}&& CSRF prefix before decoding. Optional: region_id (default: 30772), region_type (default: 6), status (default: 1) (plus 2 more).

params.name: region_id
params.description: Redfin region ID (numeric). Find it by inspecting a redfin.com/city/<id>/... URL or via `region resolve`.

params.name: status
params.description: Listing status: 1=active for-sale, 7=sold, 9=pending, 130=coming-soon. Compose with --sf for sold.

params.name: num_homes
params.description: Number of homes to return per page (max 350).

tools.name: listing_initial
tools.description: First Stingray call for a listing — returns the canonical listingId and propertyId from the URL path. Required: path (default: /TX/Austin/example/home/12345).

tools.name: market_trends
tools.description: Fetch aggregate-trends JSON for one region and period (months). Required: region_type (default: 6), region_id (default: 30772), period_months (default: 24).
